MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Judge: Andy Cheng; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha ; Not Reported. (D218)
Eileen Cristin O'Keefe, Esq., representing the defendant Philip Van Galen through limited scope.
No appearances by the Plaintiff Nasir Shaikh.
The settlement conference is taken off calendar, trial date of Oct. 19, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 206 remains on calendar.
